serverInfo.name: GitWand MCP Server
serverInfo.description: Smart Git conflict resolution for AI agents — auto-resolves trivial merge conflicts and guides AI through complex ones with a full DecisionTrace.

transport.description: Runs as a local stdio process. Launch via npx or install globally.

tools.name: gitwand_status
tools.description: List conflicted files in the current Git repo with conflict counts, types, and auto-resolvability scores.

tools.name: gitwand_resolve_conflicts
tools.description: Auto-resolve trivial Git merge conflicts using GitWand's pattern-based engine. Returns DecisionTrace and pendingHunks for complex conflicts.

tools.name: gitwand_preview_merge
tools.description: Dry-run conflict resolution — shows auto-resolvable vs. manual hunks without modifying files.

tools.name: gitwand_explain_hunk
tools.description: Explain why a specific conflict hunk was classified as complex, with full DecisionTrace.

tools.name: gitwand_apply_resolution
tools.description: Apply a custom resolution (from the LLM) to a specific conflict hunk.

tools.name: gitwand_resolve_hunk_llm
tools.description: v2.5 — Validate and apply an LLM-proposed resolution for a complex hunk. Checks for residual markers, syntax errors, and a configurable score threshold before writing. Returns full audit trail.

resources.name: Current Conflicts
resources.description: Live conflict state of the current repo — file list, counts, and auto-resolvability.

resources.name: Merge Policy
resources.description: .gitwandrc configuration — merge policies, confidence thresholds, per-path overrides.

resources.name: Hunk Detail
resources.description: Raw hunk content (ours/theirs/base) plus confidence and DecisionTrace for a specific conflict.
